preLaunchRequirements.title: Define concrete database backup RPO/RTO and ownership
Define document/file backup and tested restore path
Gate production launch on SMTP/email provider readiness

securityAuthHardening: Expand rate-limit coverage for admin write/auth sensitive endpoints (SEC-004)
Keep cross-user isolation assertions in CI smoke gate (SEC-005)
paymentCreditHardening: Add CI check to prevent Stripe test/live key mix-up (PAY-005)
Retain webhook idempotency and completed-event-only credit policy (PAY-003)
documentEvidenceHardening: Add retention/deletion SOP for sensitive evidence documents (DOC-004)
Add malware/content scanning to upload flow hardening backlog (DOC-002)
errorLoadingEmptyStateGaps: Standardize explicit empty-state messaging across diagnostics and evidence screens
observabilityMonitoringGaps: Add log retention + alert routing policy documentation
Keep deployment-truth and runtime diagnostics in release gate
backupRecoveryGaps: Publish restore drill runbook with cadence and success criteria (BKP-003)
operationalAdminGaps: Create incident response playbook and severity/communication matrix (OPS-003)
Define support/debug access boundaries and approval workflow (OPS-004)
futureNonMvpItems: AI/chat remains out of scope unless explicitly planned and governed
Connector expansion remains governed; no default activation
explicitlyNotPromoted: No connector activation promoted to P0/P1
No AI chat promoted to P0/P1
